prompt: {"type":"single-page comic strip","style":"humorous comic-book illustration with bold black inks, detailed crosshatching, vibrant colors, dynamic motion lines, halftone texture, and exaggerated expressive lettering","language":"Spanish","format":"vertical page with 5 horizontal panels separated by white gutters and black borders","characters":{"human":{"role":"dog owner","appearance":"athletic adult man in a fitted black T-shirt and black athletic shorts, short dark hair, face mostly turned away or cropped","prop":"bright green tennis ball"},"dog":{"name":"{argument name=\"dog name\" default=\"Saru\"}","appearance":"small Jack Russell terrier, white coat with brown and black patches, energetic, muddy paw marks and bits of grass on fur, very expressive face"}},"setting":{"location":"sunny urban park with green lawns, dirt paths, large leafy trees, park benches, and a distant city skyline","background_feature":"a prominent grassy hill in the distance"},"layout":{"panel_count":5,"panels":[{"index":1,"composition":"low-angle medium shot of the man winding up to throw the tennis ball while the dog crouches beside him ready to sprint","text":[{"type":"speech bubble","speaker":"human","content":"¡ATENTA, SARU! ¡MIRÁ QUE ESTA SE VA HASTA LA LOMA DEL ORTO, EH!"}]},{"index":2,"composition":"rear three-quarter view of the man after the throw, holding extra tennis balls behind his back, while the dog streaks across the grass as a fast blur with dust clouds and long speed lines; skyline visible ahead","text":[{"type":"speech bubble","speaker":"human","content":"¡BUSQUEEE, SARU, BUSQUEEE!"},{"type":"sound effect","content":"¡¡FIIUUUUM!!","style":"huge italic yellow letters with black outline"}]},{"index":3,"composition":"very wide panoramic landscape panel showing the entire park, winding paths, trees, skyline, and the distant hill; the dog appears small running far away","text":[{"type":"thought bubble","speaker":"dog","content":"¡TIENE QUE ESTAR POR ACÁ! Y/O NO VUELVO SIN ESA BOCHA!"}]},{"index":4,"composition":"split-focus feel within a single panel: close-up of the man at left holding up the tennis ball he never actually threw, while the dog runs back toward camera from the right side, happy and panting","text":[{"type":"speech bubble","speaker":"human","content":"¡JAJAJA, VENÍ, SARU, LA TENGO ACÁ, NO LA TIRE JAJA"}]},{"index":5,"composition":"dramatic comedic reward shot with a hand offering a roasted chicken drumstick in the left foreground and an extreme close-up of the dog’s face on the right, eyes sparkling with joy; golden radiant burst background and 3 red hearts","text":[{"type":"speech bubble","speaker":"human","content":"TOMÁ... UN POLLITO POR EL ESFUERZO QUE METISTE."},{"type":"thought bubble","speaker":"dog","content":"¡POLLO! ¡NEGOCIO REDONDO!"}]}]},"visual_notes":{"counted_objects":{"red_hearts":3,"tennis_balls_visible":2},"dog_behavior_progression":["ready to chase","sprinting at full speed","searching far away","returning happily","ecstatic at food reward"],"tone":"playful, affectionate, absurd pet-owner humor","camera":"varied comic panel cinematography with low angle, rear action shot, panoramic establishing shot, medium close-up, and extreme close-up finale"},"quality":"high-detail polished digital comic art, crisp lettering, expressive poses, cinematic action, funny and heartwarming"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"单页漫画","style":"幽默漫画插图，采用粗黑墨线、细致的交叉排线、鲜艳的色彩、动态运动线条、半色调纹理以及夸张生动的字体","language":"西班牙语","format":"垂直页面，包含 5 个由白色间隙和黑色边框分隔的水平分镜","characters":{"human":{"role":"狗主人","appearance":"运动型成年男性，身穿黑色修身 T 恤和黑色运动短裤，短黑发，脸部多为背影或被裁切","prop":"亮绿色网球"},"dog":{"name":"{argument name=\"dog name\" default=\"Saru\"}","appearance":"小型杰克罗素梗，白色皮毛带有棕色和黑色斑块，充满活力，毛发上有泥脚印和草屑，表情非常丰富"}},"setting":{"location":"阳光明媚的城市公园，有绿草坪、泥土小径、枝繁叶茂的大树、公园长椅和远处的城市天际线","background_feature":"远处一座显眼的草坡"},"layout":{"panel_count":5,"panels":[{"index":1,"composition":"低角度中景，男子准备投掷网球，狗狗蹲在他身边准备冲刺","text":[{"type":"对话气泡","speaker":"人类","content":"¡ATENTA, SARU! ¡MIRÁ QUE ESTA SE VA HASTA LA LOMA DEL ORTO, EH!"}]},{"index":2,"composition":"男子投掷后的后侧方视角，他背后藏着多余的网球，狗狗化作一道模糊的残影在草地上飞奔，伴随尘土和长长的速度线；前方可见天际线","text":[{"type":"对话气泡","speaker":"人类","content":"¡BUSQUEEE, SARU, BUSQUEEE!"},{"type":"音效","content":"¡¡FIIUUUUM!!","style":"巨大的斜体黄色字母，带有黑色描边"}]},{"index":3,"composition":"超宽全景分镜，展示整个公园、蜿蜒的小径、树木、天际线和远处的山坡；狗狗显得很小，正在远处奔跑","text":[{"type":"内心独白气泡","speaker":"狗狗","content":"¡TIENE QUE ESTAR POR ACÁ! Y/O NO VUELVO SIN ESA BOCHA!"}]},{"index":4,"composition":"单分镜内的分焦感：左侧特写男子拿着他实际上并未投出的网球，右侧狗狗正开心地喘着气跑回镜头前","text":[{"type":"对话气泡","speaker":"人类","content":"¡JAJAJA, VENÍ, SARU, LA TENGO ACÁ, NO LA TIRE JAJA"}]},{"index":5,"composition":"戏剧性的喜剧奖励镜头，左前景是一只手递出一根烤鸡腿，右侧是狗狗脸部的极致特写，眼睛闪烁着喜悦的光芒；背景为金色放射状光芒和 3 颗红色爱心","text":[{"type":"对话气泡","speaker":"人类","content":"TOMÁ... UN POLLITO POR EL ESFUERZO QUE METISTE."},{"type":"内心独白气泡","speaker":"狗狗","content":"¡POLLO! ¡NEGOCIO REDONDO!"}]}]},"visual_notes":{"counted_objects":{"red_hearts":3,"tennis_balls_visible":2},"dog_behavior_progression":["准备追逐","全速冲刺","在远处搜寻","开心地返回","因食物奖励而欣喜若狂"],"tone":"俏皮、深情、荒诞的宠物主人幽默","camera":"多样的漫画分镜电影感，包括低角度、后方动作镜头、全景建立镜头、中景特写和极致特写的结局"},"quality":"高细节精美数字漫画艺术，清晰的字体，生动的姿态，电影般的动作，既幽默又暖心"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 有趣的狗狗公园漫画页面：这是一页精美的西班牙语漫画，展示了一名男子在公园里与他的梗犬开玩笑的场景，非常适合用于生成具有动态动作和生动笑点的幽默宠物漫画。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
